title: ArObservation
description: A self-verifier finding emitted by core/aristotelian.py:verify(). Per aristotelian-sketch-01 A7 + production-format-sketch-11 PFS11-AO1..AO4. Parallels schema/lowering/lowering_observation.json and the anticipated schema/save_the_cat/observation.json: four-field structural-finding shape. severity is a closed two-value enum; code is an open non-empty string (A7 emits five-plus stable codes today but is extension-safe for new checks without a schema amendment — code close-enum deferred to PFS11 OQ1). target_id names an intra-dialect record (ArMythos / ArPhase / ArCharacter id); resolution banked as PFS11 OQ3.

severity.description: Closed enum matching core/aristotelian.py SEVERITY_NOTED / SEVERITY_ADVISES_REVIEW. noted = observation recorded, no review required; advises-review = check uncovered a structural issue the author should see. PFS11-AO2.

code.description: Short stable tag identifying the A7 check that emitted this observation. Today's codes: 'plot_kind_invalid', 'phase_roles_not_beginning_middle_end', 'peripeteia_not_in_central_events', 'anagnorisis_not_in_central_events', plus sketch-02 additions (A7.6–A7.9). Open string per PFS11-AO3 — new checks don't require a schema amendment. Code vocabulary closure deferred to PFS11 OQ1.

target_id.description: Intra-dialect record id (ArMythos / ArPhase / ArCharacter) this observation targets. Referential-integrity audit banked as PFS11 OQ3. PFS11-AO4.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the finding. No length constraint. PFS11-AO4.
